summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comment/close/label and every merge path lacks complete merge preflight, especially a clean Codex /review proof. Narrow contributor-branch repair is concrete for #84897, #89897, #89932, and #89949; #89944 needs maintainer judgment because it is broader, waiting on author, and has unresolved behavior-proof/review findings.

actions.reason: Narrow useful contributor PR, but merge is blocked by incomplete merge preflight and unresolved/latest bot-check evidence. Repair the contributor branch rather than replace it.
Useful contributor branch with maintainer modification allowed, but it needs a narrow rebase/cleanup before merge can be recommended.
Docs PR is narrow and likely repairable, but needs a current-main overlap/diff reconciliation against the already-fixed issue before any merge recommendation.
This is a broad feature/compatibility PR with active waiting-on-author status and unresolved behavior findings. The safe next step is maintainer/author decision, not Clownfish repair or merge.
Narrow and valuable contributor PR, but merge is blocked by proof-check failure and missing complete merge preflight. Repair/refresh the contributor branch and rerun proof/review.

needs_human: #89944 requires maintainer judgment because the PR is waiting on author, broad enough to affect Teams message delivery/config compatibility, and has unresolved ClawSweeper behavior findings plus failing proof/type checks.
